## 🚀 Feature Overview
Provide a clear description of the new engine, capability node, or UI feature.

## 💡 Rationale & Value
Why should this feature be added to Reverse Software Search?

## 📝 Proposed Implementation Details
Any tech stack choices, schema models, or sub-engine logic.
